svg.text: Input: "the cat sat on the mat" - query token: "sat"
Step 1 - project each token into Q, K, V via learned weight matrices
Step 2 - dot product: Q(sat) · K(every token) = relevance score

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does sat strongly attend to cat?')

svg.text: Step 3 - softmax turns scores into weights that sum to 1.0
Step 4 - weighted sum of all Value vectors → new vector for "sat"
"sat" now carries context from the whole sentence — especially "cat" (its subject).
This runs for every token in parallel, in every layer.
"river bank" → attends strongly to "river" → natural feature
"savings bank" → attends strongly to "savings" → financial institution
